title: Peculiar Predators
description: An addon for Unusual Prehistory that adds a few new creatures!
body:
Peculiar Predators is an addon for Unusual prehistory that adds 3 new prehistoric species that you can revive!

Check the In-game encyclopedia for more info on these mobs.





Added Mobs

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

 Yutyrannus,
 Troodon,
 Shastasaurus.


</details>


Requires Unusual Prehistory and Geckolib to work
